regime_fall.current_status: US military presence in West Asia has surged to over 57,000 troops with planned additional 10,000 deployments, including USS Tripoli's 3,500-person MEU and 82nd Airborne elements positioned near Kharg Island, while Trump maintains diplomatic pause on strikes until April 6 despite Iran's rejection of ceasefire terms and succession to hardline leadership following Khamenei's death.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US troop levels in West Asia reached over 57,000 as of March 30, 2026, representing the largest military buildup since the 2003 invasion of Iraq, with additional 10,000 ground troops planned for deployment.
